title: PlayerVisibility
description: PlayerVisibility is a plugin that via a command makes players invisible to each other except staff.
body:
---

# ✨ **PlayerVisibility**

## 🧩 **FEATURES**

### 🎭 **Customizable Command Aliases**

Easily customize command aliases.

### 👥 **Change Player Visibility**

Change the visibility of **ALL players** on the server, except staff members.

### 🔓 **Bypass Permission**

Allow certain players to bypass visibility restrictions.

### 💾 **AutoSave on Server Reboot**

Automatically save settings when the server restarts.

### ⚙️ **Auto Config Update**

Automatically update the configuration file.

### 🔄 **Auto Update**

Keep the plugin always up to date with the latest version automatically.

---

## 🧭 **COMMANDS**

`/playervisibility hide`
→ Make players invisible to each other.

`/playervisibility show`
→ Make players visible to each other.

`/playervisibility reload`
→ Reload the plugin configuration.

---

## 🔐 **PERMISSIONS**

Permissions are fully configurable in the **config.yml** file.

---

## 🆘 **SUPPORT**

🔗 Discord Support: **[https://dsc.gg/futuredevelopment](https://dsc.gg/futuredevelopment)**

---
